title: Permissions
intro: The role defaults (Admin / Site manager / Standard) apply as normal. These toggles adjust what standard users (mechanics) may do across the whole business.

editPricing.label: Mechanics can edit estimates & pricing
editPricing.desc: When on, standard users can edit the estimate/quote on job cards at their location. Off: only managers and admins.

diaryEntries.label: Mechanics can add diary notes & create entries
diaryEntries.desc: When on, standard users can add/edit diary notes and create new entries from the diary at their location. Off: only managers and admins.

finance.heading: Diary financials
finance.intro: Who can see money on the diary. Admins/owners always see everything. Values = per-job value + the “booked” total; margin = the profit total (exposes cost structure, so it’s tighter).

managerValues.label: Site managers can see values
managerValues.desc: Per-block values and the “booked” total on the diary.

managerMargin.label: Site managers can see margin
managerMargin.desc: The margin total on the diary.

standardValues.label: Mechanics can see values
standardValues.desc: Per-block values and the “booked” total. Off by default.

standardMargin.label: Mechanics can see margin
standardMargin.desc: The margin total. Off by default — margin exposes cost.
